title: EXERZ 10CM Mini Globe (Political Map), with Pencil Sharpener build in - English Map
features: - DETAILED AND ACCURATE: EXERZ’s 10CM mini globe comes with extra-fine printing. This globe not only helps children learn about geography but also encourages curiosity and a love for exploring the world. It is a great addition to classrooms, homeschooling environments, and even as a decorative piece in your child's room.
- POLITICAL MAP: This globe is small but functional, features clear and precise country borders, capitals, and major cities, providing an excellent tool for geography education.

- PENCIL SHARPENR: The globe comes with a build-in pencil sharpener, allowing children to sharpen their pencils while exploring the world. It adds a fun and practical element to the learning experience.

- PORTABLE AND DURABLE: This educational globe is only 10cm in diameter, making it perfect for small spaces and on-the-go learning. Made from sturdy materials, this globe is built to withstand everyday use and is designed to last. It can withstand accidental drops and bumps without losing its educational value.
- GIFT IDEA: Whether it's for a birthday or holiday, this educational globe with a pencil sharpener function makes a great gift for boys and girls of all ages.
